TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Hngkawas_2024_ka_seejiq_qnpah_nkana_ka_bukung_klwaan_Cung-hwa-ming-ku, title = Hngkawas_2024_ka_seejiq_qnpah_nkana_ka_bukung_klwaan_Cung-hwa-ming-ku, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hngkawas_2024_ka_seejiq_qnpah_nkana_ka_bukung_klwaan_Cung-hwa-ming-ku} }

S.FORM: = hngkawas 2024 ka seejiq qnpah nkana ka bukung klwaan Cung-hwa-ming-ku = Gaga seejiq qnpah nkana ka bukung klwaan o muda ku jiyax 13 idas 1 ka jiyax hngkawas 2024. == seejiq qnpah nkana ==
S.PHON: = ħŋkawas **** ka səəɟiq qnpaħ nkana ka bukuŋ klwaan ʦuŋ-ħwa-miŋ-ku = gaga səəɟiq qnpaħ nkana ka bukuŋ klwaan o muda ku ɟijax ** idas * ka ɟijax ħŋkawas ****. == səəɟiq qnpaħ nkana ==
